basics.name: Deeksha Varshney
basics.label: Assistant Professor · Computer Science & Engineering
basics.summary: Assistant Professor at IIT Jodhpur working on Natural Language Processing, Dialogue Systems, Reasoning, Interpretability in LLMs, NLP for Healthcare and Climate, and Multilingual Language Models.

work.name: IIT Jodhpur
work.summary: Faculty member at SAIDE, IIT Jodhpur, focusing on NLP, Dialogue Systems, Reasoning, Interpretability in LLMs, Healthcare and Climate AI.

work.name: National University of Singapore
work.summary: Worked on entity hallucination in dialogue systems, interpretability, climate AI and sustainable finance under Prof. Gianmarco Mengaldo.

work.name: National University of Singapore
work.summary: Research on uncertainty estimation in Large Language Models under Prof. Yang You.

summary: Teaching an advanced course on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) at IIT Jodhpur.
Covered topics including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformer models, NLP pipelines, and hands-on projects.
Supervised student projects and guided research-oriented exercises in AI and NLP.

references.name: Dr. Asif Ekbal
references.reference: Associate Professor, Department of Computer Science & Engineering, IIT Patna, India. Email: asif@iitp.ac.in

references.name: Dr. Vivek Singh
references.reference: Associate Professor, Department of Computer Science, Banaras Hindu University, India.

volunteer.summary: Session Chair at the 35th Pacific Asia Conference on Language, Information and Computation (PACLIC35).
Tutorial on Conversational AI and Knowledge-enhanced Response Generation in Dialogue Systems: Current Advancements and Emerging Horizons.
Tutorial on Conversational AI and Knowledge-enhanced Response Generation in Dialogue Systems at LREC-COLING.
Volunteer for GIAN Workshop on Introduction to Unsupervised Data Mining: From Batch to Stream Mining Algorithms.
Reviewer for ACL, ACL-SRW, Expert Systems and Applications, TALLIP, ICON, ICONIP, TCBB, PLOS One, and Neural Networks (Elsevier).
Attendee at Google Research Week, Amazon Research Week, and ACM India Grad Cohort, Bangalore.
Student representative for the Departmental Academic Program Committee, Department of Computer Science and Engineering.
Program Committee member for ICONIP, IJCNLP-AACL Demos 2023, and ICON 2023.
Position paper titled "Spoken Dialogue Systems" accepted at the YRRSDS 2022 Workshop.
